name: TBW Consent to Participate and Access Records
description: Consent to participate in The Book Works programs plus learner demographic information.

screens.helpText:
The Book Works is a non-profit organization that advocates for youth and young adults to have equitable access to education and employment. We may connect you with an Education Advocate, a TBW-hosted program, or opportunities to build connections and learn new things.

The Book Works is not part of the court or school systems. We do not provide legal advice or homeschool curriculum. All programs and services are voluntary.

We may collect information on your education history and goals, contact information, services received, and demographics. Sharing this information with The Book Works is voluntary and all information is kept in a confidential database that is exclusive to The Book Works.

In accordance with the Family Educational Rights and Privacy Act (FERPA), all information will be kept private unless required by law. You or your parent/guardian (if under 18) must provide consent before we access or share your information, and you may revoke that permission at any time.

screens.prompt: I understand the goals of The Book Works are to assist the participant to reach their education goals, and that The Book Works does not provide legal advice.
I understand that The Book Works may directly contact the participant of the program.
I understand The Book Works may follow up on the participant's school attendance after services.
I give consent for The Book Works to access and share information about the participant with:
screens.helpText: List any schools, agencies, or community organizations. Leave any field blank if it does not apply.
A few questions about the participant so we can serve them well. Most of this is already on file — just confirm or update.

screens.prompt: How do you describe your race and ethnicity?
How do you describe your gender / gender identity?
What are your goals for working with The Book Works? (select all that apply)

options.label: Participate in an after-school or summer program

screens.prompt: If you selected "Other" above, please describe.
Are there any physical or behavioral health concerns (including allergies and medical conditions) that impact you at school? What should we know?

screens.helpText: The Book Works can talk with trusted adults about your goals and needs.

screens.prompt: Anything else you would like us to know?

screens.helpText: Take a moment to look over what you've entered. You can use Back to fix anything before signing.

screens.prompt: Type your full name to sign
screens.helpText: By typing your name below and tapping Sign, you are electronically signing this Consent to Participate and Access Records.
